checkout.emptyCartMessage: Add some items before checking out.
checkout.codDescription: Pay when your order is delivered.
checkout.applePayDescription: Pay securely with Apple Pay on supported devices.
checkout.applePayUnavailable: Apple Pay is not available on this device yet. On your iPhone: open the Wallet app → add a debit/credit card → make sure Apple Pay is enabled. Then reopen this page in Safari (not Chrome or WhatsApp).
checkout.applePayNotConfigured: Apple Pay is not available yet. Payment setup is still in progress.
checkout.agreeToTerms: By placing order you agree to our terms
checkout.successMessage: Your order has been placed successfully.
